raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on Sun, XX/XX/year>, it has already been XXXX  months and i still have not received the product. 
Every time i contact them they told me my order is being fulfilled but due to large volume they are unable to give me estimated time of delivery. They created a shipping label but the item was never shipped. My last attempt to contact them to ask for a refund was met with no response I contacted my bank citi to initiate a dispute they told me to mail in documentation, which I did. I provided my receipt, purchase invoice, a shipping label created that was never shipped, and every interaction I had with XXXX customer service. They told me they can not look into the transaction because it has been too long and I need to reach out to XXXX directly XXXX name : XXXX Email : XXXX XXXX
